2605.06530.title: SpatialEpiBench: Benchmarking Spatial Information and Epidemic Priors in Forecasting
2605.06530.paper_summary: Accurate epidemic forecasting is crucial for public health response, resource allocation, and outbreak intervention, but remains difficult with sparse, noisy, and highly non-stationary data. Because epidemics unfold across interacting regions, spatiotemporal methods are natural candidates for improving forecasts. Despite growing interest in spatial information, no standardized benchmark exists, and current evaluations often use simple chronological train-test splits that do not reflect real-time forecasting practice. We address this gap with SpatialEpiBench, a challenging benchmark for spatiotemporal epidemic forecasting in realistic public-health settings. SpatialEpiBench includes 11 epidemic datasets with standardized rolling evaluations and outbreak-specific metrics. We evaluate adjacency-informed forecasting models with widely used epidemic priors that adapt general models to epidemiology, but find that most methods underperform a simple last-value baseline from 1 day to 1 month ahead, even during outbreaks and with these priors. We identify three major failure modes: (1) poor outbreak anticipation, (2) difficulty handling sparsity and noise, and (3) limited utility of common geographic adjacency for epidemiological spatial information. We release benchmark data, code, and instructions at https://github.com/Rachel-Lyu/SpatialEpiBench to support development of operationally useful epidemic forecasting models.
2605.06530.paper_summary_zh: 準確的疫情預測對於公共衛生應對、資源分配和疫情干預至關重要，但在稀疏、噪聲和高度非平穩的數據下仍然困難。由於疫情在互動區域中展開，時空方法自然成為改善預測的候選者。儘管對空間信息的興趣日益增長，但目前尚無標準化的基準，現有評估通常使用簡單的時間序列訓練-測試劃分，這並不反映實時預測實踐。我們通過SpatialEpiBench來填補這一空白，這是一個針對現實公共衛生環境中時空疫情預測的挑戰性基準。SpatialEpiBench包含11個疫情數據集，具有標準化的滾動評估和針對疫情的特定指標。我們評估了基於相鄰信息的預測模型，這些模型使用廣泛應用的疫情先驗知識，將通用模型適應於流行病學，但發現大多數方法在1天到1個月的預測中表現不如簡單的最後值基準，即使在疫情期間並使用這些先驗知識。我們確定了三種主要失敗模式：（1）對疫情的預測不佳，（2）處理稀疏性和噪聲的困難，以及（3）常見地理相鄰性對流行病學空間信息的有限效用。我們在https://github.com/Rachel-Lyu/SpatialEpiBench發布基準數據、代碼和說明，以支持開發實用的疫情預測模型。
2605.06530.author: Ruiqi Lyu et.al.
2605.06530.authors: Ruiqi Lyu, Alistair Turcan, Bryan Wilder
